payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet corner showing vertical recessed panel doors and the light-colored countertop edge at the top; top edge shows minor wear and the image is a close-range capture (approximately 0.8 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark wooden cabinet edge crop","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet corner showing vertical recessed panel doors and the light-colored countertop edge at the top; top edge shows minor wear and the image is a close-range capture (approximately 0.8 m from camera).","attributes":["dark stained wood","recessed panel doors","light-colored countertop edge","top corner visible","edge-cropped/partial","minor wear at top edge","vertical orientation","matte to semi-gloss finish"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
